underlying_goal: Build and iteratively refine a React Native/Expo pet management app (PetauLife+) with features like biometric login, password reset, offline support, pet profiles, camera, drawer navigation, and a polished toast/dialog UI system
friction_detail: NetworkGuard offline banner persisted across many fix attempts due to Android null network state, Claude overwrote user's custom PNG paw icons with ugly auto-generated SVGs, Edge Functions refused to serve HTML, and APK crashed due to missing env variables in EAS build.
brief_summary: User iteratively built a React Native pet care app across many features (biometric login, email reset, offline mode, toast system, drawer nav, EAS builds), mostly achieving goals despite significant friction with network state handling, icon overwrites, and build configuration issues.
